narrative:
Grove City 2-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 969 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
